title: tanacetum polycephalum subsp. junesarense
intro: Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. junesarense, also known as Japanese tansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the aster family native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. junesarense include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. junesarense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
